programs.title: Escape to Florida
programs.desc: The fun-filled lives of the Brits seeking a fresh start. In Orlando, it's opening night for the Best of British pub. In Kissimmee, Anthony's busy cooking at his own birthday party.

programs.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programs.desc: The Garners show Helen and Peter a showstopper with two pools, a separate apartment and spectacular views. The Aldertons deliver Costa Blanca surprises for Caroline and David.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Ravin and Pritti want to find a new permanent home on Gran Canaria for themselves and their extended family. Jean Johansson shows them five fantastic properties for their £180,000 budget.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Catherine and Paul have their hearts set on buying a holiday home on the Costa Adeje, Tenerife, to enjoy with their family. Can Laura Hamilton find their perfect property for £150k.

programs.title: A Place in the Sun
programs.desc: Bob and Vida want to buy a holiday bolthole on the west coast of the Peloponnese that one day could become their permanent home. Can Laura Hamilton find the perfect place for their £300k.

programs.title: Chateau DIY
programs.desc: Vivienne and Simon re-invent a tired room into an Empire suite. But with loads to do will the Empire strike back? And Tim and Sasha's bride goes missing.
